title: SoniCraft Demons X-Tras
description: An incomplete unofficial addon of EnderPreston's "SoniCraft", based off EXEs, SonicPastas, and Oddities.
body:
**Requires [Geckolib (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), [SoniCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/sonicraft), and for 0.3.0 onward, [SoniCraft Demons](https://modrinth.com/mod/sonicraft-demons/version/1.2.0) to work properly!**

![hello.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cffa04a327ab6d81e9502c280bc91a7b2c50b3e.png)

An unofficial addon of Sonic.EXE for EnderPreston's SoniCraft. Sonic Creepypastas/franchises that are and _WILL_ be added are:

SOULLESS SONIC (Genesis AND Soulless Saga)

Sonic Prototype 2017

AWAKENING/SONIC LEGACY

Chinelin's SONIC

The Blue Pendrive (FLASHING LIGHTS!!)

~~Hog the Tenrec (Pre-0.4.2)~~

Somari the Adventurer (And SONIC HAS PASSED)

Rewrite/Vs.Sonic Round 2

Sonic.EXE:One More Time Repixeled/OMT Series

Sonic2.EXE

SonicEDIT.ROM expansion

Sonic the Comic

Sonic CD/A mishmash of Majin Sonic concepts (notably Vs.Sonic.EXE and MORO's sprite animation)

And more to come.

Creepypastas/EXEs already in SoniCraft Demons that have little content will also get additions.

(Note:This is a HEAVY beta. Bugs will persist. Keep in mind this is NOT the final version. I would **NOT** add this to your desired worlds as registry names **WILL** or **POSSIBLY WILL** change.)

(All/Most of the models/screenshots shown in the gallery are coming in future updates)

Also check out the [Gamejolt port!](https://gamejolt.com/games/sonicraft_demons_xtras/985910)
